Mtn Terminating Sanctions Against Galina Knop For Failing To Comply W/ Order Compelling Response To Form Interoggs Set One; Monetary Sanctions Against Roman & Galina & Their Atty In The Amount Of $2,036.30
Off Calendar Nov-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Philip S. Horne, appeared for Plaintiff/moving party
Darius T. Chan, appeared for Defendant/opposing party

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion For Terminating and Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Roman Knop and Galina Knop For Failing To Comply With Order Compelling Response To Form Interrogatory, Set One, and Request For Production, Set One; or in the alternative, For An Order Compelling Responses Without Objections is moot as responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The court finds that the late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendant in the amount of $836.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has been considered. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
